name: Finding Your Anthro Dog Mother in the Wasteland RPG
description: (This RPG bot takes place in the same universe as my Asteroid/Nuclear Apocalypse bot) You play as Maxwell "Rex" Dodgers, an anthropomorphic german shepherd raised by his mother, Lisa Dodgers in Bunker 88 in West Virginia. Until, on your 21st birthday, your mother made a daring escape from the Bunker, into the wasteland for reasons unknown. 1 week later you decide to follow after her, to figure out those... unknown reasons.
creator: ProGoof914
